seoTitle: Oxley Island vs Oxley Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oxley Island and Oxley Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oxley Island vs Oxley Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oxley Island and Oxley Vale.
heading: Oxley Island vs Oxley Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oxley Island, New South Wales and Oxley Vale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oxley Island has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Oxley Vale (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oxley Island or Oxley Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oxley Island has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Oxley Vale scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oxley Island scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Oxley Vale scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oxley Island or Oxley Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oxley Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
